sections.sectionTitle: Ezra leh A Pawlte Jerusalem-ah Hong Tung

verses.text: Hih thu teng khit ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis uk hun sungin Ezra, a pa Seraiah, a pa Azariah, a pa Hikiah
a pa Shalum, a pa Zadok, a pa Ahitub
a pa Amariah, a pa Azariah, a pa Meraioth
a pa Zerahiah, a pa Uzzi, a pa Bukki
a pa Abishua, a pa Finehas, a pa Eleazar, a pa siampi lianpenpa Aaron—

hih Ezra pen Babylon panin hong tungto hi. Amah pen Israel Pasian, Topa in a piak Moses thukham a siam laithei mi khat ahi hi. Topa ahi ama Pasian in ompih ahih manin ama nget khempeuh kumpipa in a pia hi
Kumpi Artakzaksis in a uk a kum sagihna kumin Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, lasate, kongcingte, leh biak-inn nasem pawlkhat zong, Jerusalem-ah Ezra tawh tungto uh hi
Kumpipa' uk kum sagih a cin' kum, a kha ngana sungin Jerusalem tung uh hi
A kha masa a ni khat ni-in Babylon pan a dingkhia dingin Ezra in a ni sehkhol a, a kha ngana a ni khat ni-in Jerusalem a tung uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in amah ompih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Ezra in Topa' thukham sinin zuih ding, leh Israel mite a hilh dingin amah kipia hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kumpi Artakzaksis in Ezra a Piak Lai

verses.text: Kumpi Artakzaksis in siampi ahi, laitheipa lah ahi, Israel-te-a' dingin Topa' thupiaknate leh thukhamte a siam Ezra tungah a piak lai pen hih bang ahi hi
“Kumpite' kumpi ahi Artakzaksis kiang panin vantung Pasian' thukham a siam, siampi hi-in laitheipa lah ahi Ezra tungah

“Ka lungsim khentatna hih bang ahi hi: Ka gamsunga om Israel mi khatpeuh ahi a, a siampite uh ahi a, Levi mite ahi zongin, Jerusalem-ah a ciahkik nuam khempeuh in nang hong zuih theihna dingun thu ka pia hi
Nang tungah hong kipia ahi na Pasian' thukham tawh kisai-in Judah leh Jerusalem-ah thu bangci om hiam cih a va thei dingin kumpipa keimah leh thu hong lamlak mihing sagihte in kong sawl uh hi
Kumpipa leh a thu lamlakte in Jerusalem-ah a teng Israel Pasian tungah lungkim takin a piak ngun leh khamte zong
Babylon gamah na muh uh ngun leh khamte, leh Jerusalem-a note' Pasian' biakinn dingin mite leh siampite in lungkim takin a piak khiat zuazuate uh tawh a va puakkhawm ding na hi uh hi

“Hih ka thupiakna tawh kizui-in hih sumte pen Jerusalem-a note' Pasian' biakinn-a biakna tau tungah piak dingin bawngtalte, tuutalte, tuunote, leh a an tawh biaknate, leh a leenggahzu tawh biakna dingte leina ding bekin na zang ding uh hi
Tua banah ngun leh kham a val a omlai leh, note' Pasian' deihna tawh kituakin hoih na sak bangun na lawmte tawh na zang thei ding uh hi
Na Pasian' biakinn-ah zat dingin hong kipia umlebeelte pen Jerusalem Pasian tungah na va pia ding hi
Na Pasian' biakinn-a dingin a kisam, na piak ding a phamawh a omkhak zenzen leh kumpipa sum sung panin na zang thei ding hi

“Tua hi a, kumpipa keimah Artakzaksis in Eufratis Gungal gamsunga om kumpi vankemte khempeuh tungah hih bangin thu ka pia hi: Vantung Pasian' thukham a siam lai a thei, siampi Ezra in note tung panin a kisapna hong nget ciangin
ngun talen za khat, mangbuh seu za khat, leenggahzu tambong za nih, sathau tambong za nih ciang, leh ci a deih zahzah na pia ding uh hi
Vantung Pasian in a deih peuhpeuh, vantung Pasian biakinn-a dingin limtakin hih un. Tua hi kei leh kumpipa tapate leh kumpi gam tungah amah hong heh khading hi

Siampite, Levi mite, lasate, kongcingte, biakinn nasemte, ahih kei leh hih Pasian' biakinn-a nasemte khat peuhpeuh tung panin siah ahi a, mangmu ahi a, losap ahi zongin lakna ding thu na neih lohna uh zong kong zasak uh hi, ka ci hi

“Tua hi a, nang Ezra in nang tungah hong kipia na Pasian' pilna tawh kizui-in Eufratis Gungal gamsunga mite thu a khen dingin na Pasian' thukham a thei mite seh in. Nang leh amaute in na Pasian' thukham a theilote na hilh ding uh hi

Na Pasian' thukham leh kumpipa' thukham a manglo peuhmah, sihna ahi a, hawlkhiatna ahi a, neihsa matna ahi a, thongkiatna ahi zongin, a ngah ding a kilawm thukhenna tawh khauhtakin gim kipia ding hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin Ezra in, “Jerusalem-a om Topa' biakinn tua bangin a minthangsak thuah dingin kumpipa lungsimah suak a, kumpipa leh a thu lamlakte leh a uliante kei tungah a thunuam dingin a bawl i pu i pate' Pasian ahi Topa in thupha ngah ta hen!” a ci hi. Tua hi a, Topa ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna thei ka hih manin ka lungsim hong hang a, kei hong zui dingin Israel makaite ka khawm hi.
